summary: Good‑quality capture of a fun Holbrook 1984 night, highlighted by a hot Black Peter.
review: The recording is praised as a great capture of the evening, offering clear enough sound to enjoy the party atmosphere. While the show isn’t deemed one of the band’s finest, it delivers solid moments—most notably an energetic Black Peter with strong end‑section harmonies. Overall it’s a pleasant summer‑tour snapshot for fans.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed review; shows mixed but generally positive feelings (4 ★) and mentions good recording quality, leading to a moderate‑high rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls it a 'great capture' with no complaints about clarity or mix, indicating satisfactory technical quality.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Fun party vibe with good moments; not considered the strongest overall performance but enjoyable as part of a great summer tour.
